title: CP9 Battles in the Tower of Justice: Key Exchange
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as the scene develops across pages 10–13.
scene: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of cp9 battles in the tower of justice: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Has a great idea of how

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No, no, this isn't the time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And I'll be found and killed!! NO!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hey, why're you looking at me....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And pre-aring to Crow? Stop it.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ... now then, shall I wreak havoc?
